headline: MediaMelon Joins Akamai Qualified Compute Partner Program to Deliver Real-Time Streaming Analytics at Global Scale
summary: SmartSight streaming intelligence platform runs natively on Akamai Cloud, combining CDN-level telemetry with player-side analytics to give streaming operators complete visibility from origin to screenCAMBRIDGE, Mass., April 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) announced today that MediaMelon is the latest organization to join the Akamai Qualified Compute Partner Program as an Independent Software Vendor (ISV). MediaMelon provides SmartSight™, a video-first streaming intelligence pl
